DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-21-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. COURTNEY S. SCHORR & ATTY. LAURA E. COOMBS OF THE MCGUIRE WOODS LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 1-412-667-6000 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. SHANE J. MOSES OF THE MCNUTT LAW GROUP LLP, TEL. NO. 1-415-995-8475 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS STEVEN SCHEINKMAN AND JOLENE MYERS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. The complaint adequately pled fraud of the asserted types. Defendants' arguments either misstate law or dispute facts, which is improper in a demurrer. Defendant Scheinkman's alleged misrepresentations were not just of current facts. (See, e.g., Cmplt. Para. 17, 29, 35.) Tenzer v. Superscope, Inc. (1985) 39 Cal.3d 18 regards proof of fraudulent intent, not pleading. (Id. at 30.) That plaintiff justifiably relied was adequately pled by alleged that the April 16 letter's misrepresentations caused plaintiff to refrain from declaring default. Damages are adequately pled. Wavier is a factual argument. Integration clauses do not bar fraud claims. (Hartman v. Shell Oil Co. (1977) 63 Cal.App.3d 240, 251.) The complaint adequately pled that defendants misrepresented IBS's financial state, as well as negligent misrepresentation, inducement and concealment. Answer to be filed on or before January 13, 2017. Order signed in open court. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Rhonda Harris, CSR # 7414 =302/ru

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2016 Text Ruling

ATTY. SHANE J. MOSES OF THE MCNUTT LAW GROUP LLP, TEL. NO. 1-415-995-8475 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. VERIFIED APPLICATION OF COURTNEY S. SCHORR TO APPEAR AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE FOR THE PLAINTIFF HD SPECIAL-SITUATIONS III, LP is GRANTED. No opposition was filed. Moving party to prepare form of order. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Rhonda Harris, CSR # 7414 =302/ru
